title: Advanced Excel Toolkit
subhead: Master the tools real accountants use to tame messy data.

chunks.title: Welcome to the Data Dungeon
chunks.bodyHtml:
In the real world, you get a 5,000-row CSV export from your offshore drafting team's timesheet software.

As a Staff Accountant, your job is to turn raw, messy labor hours into clean Journal Entries to track project profitability. To do this, you need three tools: Data Cleaning, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, and PivotTables.

chunks.title: Lab: The Messy Timesheet Export
chunks.instructionsHtml:
Your Task:

  1. Download the raw drafting labor data below.
  2. Use Text-to-Columns to split the messy Date column.
  3. Use VLOOKUP to assign a Project Code to each drafting task.
  4. Create a PivotTable summarizing total CAD hours by Project Code.
chunks.reflectionPrompt: What was the total CAD hours billed to the Texas Long-Haul Project?

questions.q: Why is XLOOKUP generally preferred over VLOOKUP in modern accounting?
options: It defaults to an exact match and can look left
questions.explanation: XLOOKUP defaults to exact match (no more adding 'FALSE' at the end) and can return arrays to the left of the lookup value.
